title: acalypha australis f. velutina
intro: Acalypha australis f. velutina, also known as the velvet copperleaf, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acalypha australis f. velutina include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be made into tea or tincture, and it can also be used topically in the form of a poultice or salve to treat skin issues.
